name: SkuDetails
description: Details of the product being prepared or a pre-packaged good being sold. Includes information such as UPC barcode, unique identifiers, or classification information.

skuSlug.description: A system-unique, human-readable identifier for the product.

skuId.description: A unique identifier for the product.

dietaryClassifications.description: All dietary classifications that apply to the product.

allergenClassifications.description: All allergens that are present in the product.

storageRequirements.description: All storage requirements that apply to the product.

additives.description: All additives present in the item. Additives are free strings.

countryOfOriginIso2.description: The 2-letter country ISO2 code for where the product originated from.

containsAlcohol.description: Indicates whether or not this product contains alcohol.

nutritionalInfo.description: The nutritional information for the product.

servings.description: The number of servings for the product.

producerInformation.description: Information about the producer of this product. May or may not be the same as the distributor.

distributorInformation.description: Information about the distributor of this product. May or may not be the same as the producer.
